## Description of Documentation Needed

A clear description of what needs to be documented, updated, or improved.

## Section or File Affected

Which folder or markdown document needs updating (e.g. `docs/00-Engineering/CodingStandards.md`).

## Proposed Content Outline

Outline the structure or suggest content for the new/updated docs.
